summary: REQ-10 is fully implemented in Layout.tsx with the logo image, app name, home link, responsive layout, and existing nav links preserved. REQ-9 requires a generated logo image file placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/, but no such file appears in the diff (no files were added).

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a professional government/civic services app logo image and place it in frontend/public/assets/generated/ as app-logo.dim_128x128.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image file frontend/public/assets/generated/app-logo.dim_128x128.png is referenced in Layout.tsx but is not present in the diff (ADDED FILES: none). The acceptance criteria require the logo image file to exist in that directory.

hallucinated_features.description: A fallback SVG shield icon is injected via inline DOM manipulation (onError handler) when the logo image fails to load
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not specify any fallback behavior for a missing logo image. The implementation adds an onError handler that replaces the broken image with an inline SVG shield icon via innerHTML manipulation.

hallucinated_features.description: A subtitle line 'Civic Services Portal' is displayed beneath the app name in the navigation bar
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies displaying the app name 'Complaint Management System' alongside the logo. No subtitle or secondary line was requested.
